Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated creatinine in both serum and blood, and significant proteinuria and microalbuminuria, indicating severe renal dysfunction, possibly advanced chronic kidney disease. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal impairment and possible tubular dysfunction. HbA1c is low, excluding chronic hyperglycemia. Immediate nephrology evaluation is recommended.
